mcModal.title: Link Minecraft Account
mcModal.description: Link your Minecraft account via Discord verification on Hypixel.
mcModal.step1Desc: Launch Minecraft and connect to server mc.hypixel.net.
mcModal.step2Desc: In the lobby, right-click your head (My Profile).
mcModal.step3Desc: Click the Twitter icon (Social Media) and then click the Discord icon.
mcModal.step4Desc: Type your exact Discord username in chat: {username}
mcModal.step5Desc: Enter your Minecraft username and click the Verify button.

dashboardInfo.title: Custom Dashboard Beta
dashboardInfo.subtitle: How it works now, what is coming next, and where we are heading.
dashboardInfo.whatIsBody: Custom Dashboard lets you build a personal layout from widgets and keep your most-used profile data in one place. It is designed as a fast control panel, not a static profile page.
dashboardInfo.howItWorksTitle: Grid slots, live profile data, and edit mode
dashboardInfo.howItWorksBody: You can place widgets on a grid, move them around in edit mode, and store separate layouts in slots. Linked profile widgets fetch SkyCrypt data so you can quickly monitor important stats.
dashboardInfo.progressPoint3: Live profile widgets and inventory visuals
dashboardInfo.roadmapPoint1: More widget types (economy, events, profile deltas)
dashboardInfo.roadmapPoint2: Better responsive behavior for smaller displays
dashboardInfo.feedbackBody: This section is actively evolving. Feedback from real usage drives priorities for the next beta iterations.
dashboardInfo.feedbackDiscord: Have ideas or bugs to report? Write directly in our Discord feedback channel.

leaderboardsInfo.title: Community Leaderboards Beta
leaderboardsInfo.subtitle: How tier rankings work, what's being tracked, and how the system tracks your progress.
leaderboardsInfo.whatIsBody: The Leaderboards page displays global rankings of SkyBlock players across various metrics. Track your position against the community and watch your rank change in real time as you progress.
leaderboardsInfo.tierBody: Upgrade to VIP or MVP to unlock exclusive tier badges in community rankings. Stand out with a visual indicator of your premium membership status.
leaderboardsInfo.filtersPoint1: Sort by Skyblock Level, Slayer XP, Skill Average, and more
leaderboardsInfo.filtersPoint2: Filter by time period: All time, Daily, Weekly, Monthly
leaderboardsInfo.filtersPoint3: View rankings by player category: All players, Friends, Guild members
leaderboardsInfo.filtersPoint4: Search for your position instantly with live updates
leaderboardsInfo.metricsPoint1: Skyblock Level: Your overall progression tier
leaderboardsInfo.metricsPoint2: Slayer XP: Total experience from all slayer bosses
leaderboardsInfo.metricsPoint3: Skill Average: Average skill level across all skills
leaderboardsInfo.metricsPoint4: Networth: Total value of gear, inventory, and bank
leaderboardsInfo.feedbackBody: The leaderboards system is actively evolving. Your feedback helps us improve ranking accuracy, add new metrics, and create a more engaging competitive community experience.
leaderboardsInfo.feedbackDiscord: Have ideas for new metrics or found an issue? Share in our Discord feedback channel.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: The toolkit behind the numbers.
about.platformDesc: All-in-one toolkit for Hypixel Skyblock. Real-time Bazaar flips, NPC arbitrage, event countdowns, mayor intelligence, profile analytics — one fast interface. No ads, no clutter.
about.openSourceDesc: Every line inspectable. No hidden trackers, no session-ID logging. Fork it, contribute, or just read the code.
about.devBio: Hypixel Skyblock player who got tired of juggling five different websites just to check flips, events, and profiles. So I learned to code and built the one tool I always wished existed.
about.supportDesc: Servers and APIs cost money. SkyblockHub will never show ads. If you find it useful, consider buying us a coffee.
about.contactDesc: Feedback, bug reports, collaboration ideas, or just a chat about Skyblock economy — always happy to hear from you.

pricingFaq.title: Pricing & FAQ
pricingFaq.heading: Plans & Pricing
pricingFaq.subtitle: All core modules are free. Paid plans unlock advanced features, faster data, and priority updates.

faqs.q: How does the 7-day free trial work?
faqs.a: The MVP plan comes with a one-time 7-day free trial. No credit card is required to start. Once the trial expires, your account reverts to the free tier unless you subscribe. Each Discord account is limited to one trial; this cannot be reset.

faqs.q: Can I switch between VIP and MVP?
faqs.a: Yes. You can upgrade from VIP to MVP at any time; the remaining balance of your current billing cycle is prorated toward the new plan. Downgrading works the same way; the change takes effect at the start of your next billing cycle.

faqs.q: How do I cancel my subscription?
faqs.a: Go to Settings -> Subscription and click Cancel. Your paid features stay active until the end of the current billing period. After that, your account reverts to the free tier. No penalty, no questions asked.

All payments are final and non-refundable under normal circumstances. We do not offer refunds for unused time, accidental purchases, or change of mind. Refunds are only considered if SkyblockHub experiences a significant, verified outage lasting more than 7 consecutive days that prevents you from using core paid features. In that case, contact us and we will evaluate a partial credit or refund on a case-by-case basis.

We use Stripe for payment processing. You can pay with any major credit or debit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover). Some regions may also support Apple Pay, Google Pay, and local payment methods through Stripe.
We never store your card details. All payment processing is handled by Stripe, a PCI Level 1 certified payment processor; the highest level of security certification in the payments industry.

faqs.q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
faqs.a: Your dashboard layouts, settings, and linked accounts are preserved. If you re-subscribe later, everything will be exactly as you left it. Your data is only deleted if you explicitly delete your account.

faqs.q: Do free users get ads or tracking?
faqs.a: No. SkyblockHub has zero ads, zero tracking cookies, and zero analytics fingerprinting for all users, free or paid. See our Privacy Policy for details.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.heading: Terms of Service
termsPage.section1Text: By accessing or using SkyblockHub, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.
termsPage.section2Text: SkyblockHub is a free, open-source web application providing tools for Hypixel Skyblock players, including Bazaar tracking, NPC arbitrage, event timers, mayor intelligence, and profile analytics. The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind.
termsPage.section3Item1: You must provide accurate information when creating an account.
termsPage.section3Item2: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials.
termsPage.section3Item3: You must not share your account with others or use another user's account.
termsPage.section4Item1: Use the platform for any illegal purpose.
termsPage.section4Item2: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the platform or its systems.
termsPage.section4Item3: Abuse the API or scrape data at excessive rates.
termsPage.section4Item4: Interfere with other users' access to the service.
termsPage.section4Item5: Use automated tools to interact with the platform without permission.
termsPage.section5Text: SkyblockHub is open-source software. The source code is available under its respective license on GitHub. "SkyblockHub" branding and logo are property of the project maintainer.
termsPage.section6Text: SkyblockHub relies on the Hypixel API and other third-party services. We are not responsible for the availability, accuracy, or terms of these external services.
termsPage.section7Text: SkyblockHub is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with Hypixel Inc., Mojang Studios, or Microsoft Corporation. All game-related content and trademarks belong to their respective owners.
termsPage.section8Text: SkyblockHub and its maintainer shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the platform, including but not limited to loss of in-game currency or items based on data provided by the platform.
termsPage.section9Text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
termsPage.section10Text: Questions about these terms? Contact us at

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.heading: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.section1Intro: SkyblockHub collects minimal data required to provide its services:
privacyPage.section1Item1Text: When you register, we store your email address and authentication credentials (Discord or direct login).
privacyPage.section1Item2Text: Provided voluntarily for profile lookups via the Hypixel API.
privacyPage.section1Item3Text: Basic server logs (IP addresses, timestamps) for security and abuse prevention. No session-ID tracking or analytics fingerprinting is used.
privacyPage.section2Item1: To authenticate your account and provide personalized features.
privacyPage.section2Item2: To fetch Hypixel Skyblock data on your behalf via public APIs.
privacyPage.section2Item3: To maintain security and prevent abuse of the platform.
privacyPage.section3Intro: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties. Data is only transmitted to:
privacyPage.section3Item1: Hypixel API - to retrieve your Skyblock profile (using your Minecraft username).
privacyPage.section3Item2: Authentication providers (Discord OAuth) - only during login flow.
privacyPage.section4Text: SkyblockHub uses essential cookies only; session cookies required for authentication. No advertising or tracking cookies are used.
privacyPage.section5Text: Account data is retained for as long as your account is active. You can request deletion of your account and all associated data by contacting us.
privacyPage.section6Intro: Under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR), you have the right to:
privacyPage.section6Item2: Request correction or deletion of your data.
privacyPage.section6Item4: Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
privacyPage.section7Text: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at
